Package se.ifmo.blazingzephyr.utility

Record Class Context

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
se.ifmo.blazingzephyr.utility.Context
Record Components:
filepath - Путь к файлу БД, из которого ведётся чтение и в который ведётся запись.
commands - Объект, управляющий исполнением команд.
history - История вызова команд.
collection - Объект базы данных.
io - Интерфейс ввода-вывода пользовательских данных.
public record Context(String filepath, CommandUtility commands, List<Command> history, Stack<Organization> collection, Scanner scanner) extends Record
Data-transfer-only объект. Причина, по которой он не был удалён: чтобы не передавать в Command.execute изменяющийся набор аргументов.

  • Constructor Details

    • Context

      public Context(String filepath, CommandUtility commands, List<Command> history, Stack<Organization> collection, Scanner scanner)
      Creates an instance of a Context record class.
      Parameters:
      filepath - the value for the filepath record component
      commands - the value for the commands record component
      history - the value for the history record component
      collection - the value for the collection record component
      scanner - the value for the scanner record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the filepath record component.
